ModuleName: The Stack: Structure and Use Cases

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Covers stack data structure concepts including the LIFO principle, core operations (push, pop), internal implementation details, and hands-on JavaScript class construction, serving as the navigational outline that guides learners through the module's progression of topics.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the module's topics on the stack data structure, covering what a stack is, its LIFO organization, core operations, and use cases, giving learners and instructors a structured overview of what will be taught before engaging with detailed materials.
